desc: C002 layer 2: skip the bootstrap handshake wait in FUN_004b68f0 so FUN_004b76e0's return value is ignored and the strategy scene setup (FUN_0054e570) runs immediately. Without this, the client stalls in DAT_007cd020 state 0xf/0x10 and never creates unit-list panel widget 0x67.
verified: disasm 2026-06-24: VA 0x4b6ab7 `je 0x4b6deb` exits to LAB when FUN_004b76e0 returns 0; forcing fall-through sets clientBase+0x35837f=1 and runs setup.

patches.note: je +0x32e (goto LAB_004b6deb on bootstrap not ready) -> six nops, always fall through into scene setup. 6-byte same-length patch.
